opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I'm sitting on a golf ball made of glass, and it hurts so much to pass urine. It's been getting worse for a few days and tonight it's unbearable — I can't sit still and I can't sleep.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has really escalated tonight and it's so painful to wee — I'm scared something is seriously wrong and that I might not be able to go at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: the ache built up over the last 3 days, and it got much worse after I did a heavy workout yesterday
symptom_narrative.character: a deep aching, pressure kind of pain low down between my legs — like sitting on something hard and sharp
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: tonight it's about a 9 out of 10, I can't sit or stand still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: deep down in the area between my scrotum and my back passage, and it stings badly when I pass urine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there most of the time now, worse when I sit and worse when I try to pass urine
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: standing and pacing helps a little; nothing really takes it away
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: it burns when I wee and I feel like I need to go often, but I'd rather not mention much else unless you ask
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I think I've had milder versions of this before that settled, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can walk around but I can't sit comfortably at all and I couldn't sleep tonight

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: Panadol Osteo (paracetamol) — took the usual dose tonight but it hasn't helped at all

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very anxious tonight, worried this could cause permanent damage to my waterworks

objective_data_offered.value: I am still passing small amounts of urine, but it's a struggle and it stings a lot
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report over chat; no measured urine volume or bladder scan

objective_data_offered.value: I don't think I have a fever — I feel hot from the pain but I haven't taken my temperature
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: not measured with a thermometer; cannot exclude fever on this alone
